insight_source_id.title: Source ID
insight_source_id.description: Stable identifier for this GitHub instance (e.g., 'github-acme-prod').

github_token.title: Access Token
github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token or GitHub App installation token. Required scopes: repo, read:org, read:user.

github_organizations.title: Organizations
github_organizations.description: List of GitHub organization logins to collect (e.g., ['myorg']).

github_start_date.title: Start Date
github_start_date.description: Start date for initial collection (YYYY-MM-DD). Commits before this date are skipped on the first run. Default: no limit.

max_workers.title: Concurrent Workers
max_workers.description: Number of parallel threads for child stream fetches (reviews, comments, commit files, PR commits).
